Features.title: what goya can do.
Features.subtitle: six reasons to stop waiting
Features.description: From realistic human motion to cinematic lighting — built for creators who demand more.

bottomCTA.text: ready to make your first film?

textToVideo.title: realistic human motion
textToVideo.description: Seedance 2.0 algorithm. No stiff AI artifacts — fluid, natural movement that holds up on screen.

imageToVideo.title: physical light & shadow
imageToVideo.description: Water surfaces, skin, metal — real refraction and reflection baked into every frame.

referenceGen.title: multi-ratio output
referenceGen.description: From 9:16 short-form to 2.35:1 cinematic widescreen. One prompt, every format.

enhancement.title: negative prompt engine
enhancement.description: Auto-filters broken poses and distorted anatomy. Clean output, every time.

fast.title: parallel render engine
fast.description: Concurrent processing cuts generation time by up to 300%. Coffee-break fast.

secure.title: your content, your rights
secure.description: 100% commercial license. End-to-end encrypted. What you create belongs to you.

realtime.title: Real-time Updates
realtime.description: Track your video generation progress in real-time

formats.title: Multiple Formats
formats.description: Export in various aspect ratios for any platform

ai.title: Advanced AI
ai.description: Powered by the latest AI video generation models

HowItWorks.title: a film in four steps.
HowItWorks.subtitle: the time it takes to finish a coffee
HowItWorks.description: No cameras. No crew. No editing software. Just a prompt and a few minutes.
HowItWorks.bottomHint: No credit card required • {credits} free credits to start

prompt.title: write your scene
prompt.description: Describe what you see in your head. A sentence is enough — we handle the rest.

upload.title: add a reference (optional)
upload.description: Drop in an image to anchor the style, character, or setting.

generate.title: AI renders your film
generate.description: Seedance 2.0 processes your prompt and generates a unique cinematic clip.

download.title: download & publish
download.description: Your video is ready. Download in 4K and share anywhere — it's yours.

CTA.title: next step — you're the director.
CTA.subtitle: your first frames are on us.
CTA.description: Start now. Free credits, no card required. Your imagination is the only budget you need.

testimonials.title: Loved by Creators
testimonials.subtitle: See what our users are saying

FAQ.title: questions.
FAQ.subtitle: the ones people actually ask.
FAQ.contact: still have questions? reach us at

general.question: Do I own the videos I generate?
general.answer: Yes — completely. Goya is built on commercially licensed models. Every video you generate belongs to you, with full commercial rights. Use it in ads, films, social media, or sell it. No asterisks.

commercial.question: I don't know how to write prompts. Will it still work?
commercial.answer: Absolutely. Our input box includes an AI polish layer — type a few words and we'll expand them into a cinematic-grade description. You don't need to be a prompt engineer to get great results.

aiModels.question: Which AI models do you support?
aiModels.answer: We integrate Sora 2, Veo 3.1, Wan 2.6, and Seedance 1.5 Pro. We continuously add the latest models as they become available.

credits.question: How does the credit system work?
credits.answer: Credits are consumed per generation. Different models and durations cost different amounts. New users get free credits — no card needed. Buy packs or subscribe for a steady supply at a discount.

refund.question: Do you offer refunds?
refund.answer: If a generation fails due to a system error, we refund the credits immediately. For subscription payments, contact support within 7 days.

support.question: How can I get support?
support.answer: Email support@goya.ai — we typically respond within a few hours. For urgent issues, use the contact form on our website.

PricingFaq.faq_detail: Find answers to common questions about our pricing

resetPassword.subject: Reset Your Password
resetPassword.title: Reset Your Password
resetPassword.body: We received a request to reset your password for your Goya.ai account.
resetPassword.instruction: Click the button below to reset your password:
resetPassword.validity: This link will expire in 30 minutes and can only be used once.
resetPassword.security: For security reasons, this link expires after 30 minutes.
resetPassword.ignore: If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.
resetPassword.footer: If you didn't request this, please ignore this email.
